---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{python}
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
import anndata as ad
import pandas as pd
import os
```

# load in carpall meta
```{python}
carpall_meta = pd.read_csv("/Users/rmhadgm/OneDrive - University College London/Ghorashian_group/carpall_blina_integrated/carpall_metadata_organised.csv")
carpall_meta = carpall_meta.drop(columns=["Unnamed: 0"])
```

# get list of file names of the carpall samples and then only keep samples that are in paper metadata, don't weren't in the pilot study (which is presumably why they are cellranger 302 rather than 500) and aren't a vdj sampleß
```{python}
file_names = os.listdir("/Volumes/ritd-ag-project-rd01k9-tacco78/scRNAseq data - CARPALL/")
gex_ids = carpall_meta["GEX_id"].astype(str)
file_names = [f for f in file_names if any(gid in f for gid in gex_ids)]
file_names = [f for f in file_names if "cellranger302" not in f]
file_names = [f for f in file_names if "vdj" not in f]
```

# load in carpall data, mkaing sure to give cell ids unique names
```{python}
adatas = []

for folder in file_names:
    path = os.path.join("/Volumes/ritd-ag-project-rd01k9-tacco78/scRNAseq data - CARPALL/",folder, "filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5")
    adata = sc.read_10x_h5(path)
    adata.var_names_make_unique()
    sample_id = os.path.basename(folder)
    adata.obs_names = [f"{sample_id}_{bc}" for bc in adata.obs_names]
    adata.obs["file_id"] = sample_id
    
    adatas.append(adata)
```

# combine into one adata
```{python}
carpall = sc.concat(adatas, label="file_id", keys=[os.path.basename(f) for f in file_names])
```

# make a carpall column to can distinguish/batch correct easily down the line
```{python}
carpall.obs["study"] = "carpall"
```

# make a new column pulling out the sample id from the file name, this will be used to allow the metadata to be merged
```{python}
carpall.obs["GEX_id"] = (
    carpall.obs["file_id"]
    .str.extract(r"(CAR-T\d+)")
)
carpall.obs
```

```{python}
carpall.obs = (
    carpall.obs
    .reset_index()
    .merge(carpall_meta, on="GEX_id", how="left")
    .set_index("index")
)
carpall.obs
```

# load in blina metadata
```{python}
blina_meta = pd.read_csv("/Users/rmhadgm/OneDrive - University College London/Ghorashian_group/Blina_scRNAseq/Blinatumomab_pilot_sample_details.csv")
blina_meta = blina_meta[["Patient", "Timepoint", "file_id"]]
```

```{python}
path = "/Users/rmhadgm/OneDrive - University College London/Ghorashian_group/Blina_scRNAseq/RNA"

file_names = [
    f for f in os.listdir(path)
    if not f.startswith(".")
]
```

```{python}
adatas = []

for folder in file_names:
    path = os.path.join("/Users/rmhadgm/OneDrive - University College London/Ghorashian_group/Blina_scRNAseq/RNA",folder, "sample_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5")
    adata = sc.read_10x_h5(path)
    adata.var_names_make_unique()
    sample_id = os.path.basename(folder)
    adata.obs_names = [f"{sample_id}_{bc}" for bc in adata.obs_names]
    adata.obs["file_id"] = sample_id
    
    adatas.append(adata)
```

```{python}
blina = sc.concat(adatas, label="file_id", keys=[os.path.basename(f) for f in file_names])
```

```{python}
blina.obs["study"] = "blina"
```

```{python}
blina.obs = (
    blina.obs
    .reset_index()
    .merge(blina_meta, on="file_id", how="left")
    .set_index("index")
)
blina.obs
```

```{python}
blina.obs["sample_id"] = blina.obs["file_id"]
blina.obs
```

```{python}
carpall_blina = sc.concat(
    [carpall, blina],
    join="outer",      # keep union of genes
    merge="same",
    index_unique=None
)
carpall_blina
```

```{python}
carpall_blina.write("1_carpall_blina_pre_qc.h5ad")
```
